title: BakaDanmaku
description: Used to display Bilibili live broadcast message in the in-game chat area
body:
A mod for displaying the message of Bilibili live in the chat bar in the game. Just drop it into the mod folder, start the game, and set the room number to connect to the server and realize the function of outputting live message screen in the game.

The specific effect is shown in the figure below:
![1654675467_8384_udXu.webp](https://s2.loli.net/2024/09/24/4MGVoEOp6TWYCAv.webp)

- Forge version: 
  - 1.12.2 and below use the **/BakaDanmaku** command to reload the configuration.
  - 1.13.2 and above use the shortcut key **Alt+B** to reload the configuration.

- Fabric version: shortcut key **B** to reload the configuration.

The configuration file is in `config/bakadanmaku/bilibili.json` in the main directory of the game. It is recommended to use software such as Sublime Text and Visual Studio Code to open this file.
Generally speaking, you only need to modify the room number and enable it, which means you only need to modify the following two places:

![1654675466_8384_fUHm.webp](https://s2.loli.net/2024/09/24/3eJHv4W8EDUF1fa.webp)
